title: I figured out how to multitask riding and running inside (which I  needed) w/ Timeline testing

enrichment.summary: Kyle describes a breakthrough: he can study his visual history timeline tests (a website he built covering 500 years of English history with 150 items) while riding his stationary bike or running on a treadmill, using simple button presses on a laptop trackpad. This solves his previous lack of motivation to exercise, since visual learning had been the one thing he couldn't do while working out. He also briefly outlines his broader goals of passing these tests on YouTube to attract sponsorship as a 'professional intellectual/athlete.'
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Had no motivation to exercise because auditory learning could be done anytime, but visual learning on the bike solves that
Riding a bike or treadmill while studying a visual timeline is ideal; weights and swimming don't work
Memorizing his timeline (England 1500–2000, 150 items) is a goal that can prove his intellectual performance and attract financial sponsorship
Welcomes others to contribute code to his timeline website
